The Gap

Buying Claude is easy.
Getting value from it is a system.

Claude is one of the most capable AI tools available. It's also remarkably easy to underuse. A subscription gets you access. Implementation gets you a competitive advantage.

What most companies do
  • — Buy seats, do basic prompting, hit a ceiling
  • — No shared context — every session starts from scratch
  • — Outputs that don't sound like the brand
  • — Adoption that fades after week two
What implementation looks like
  • ✓ Claude Projects loaded with your brand, ICP, and context
  • ✓ Prompt library built for your team's specific workflows
  • ✓ AI workflows that run repeating tasks without manual effort
  • ✓ Team trained and producing on day one
Two Ways We Help

Train your team, or build the system.
Usually both.

Path 01 — Team Training

Your team, trained and producing in a single session.

Live, hands-on workshops built around your team's actual work. We don't use generic examples — we use your brand voice, your content, your workflows. Everyone leaves with working prompts and configured Claude Projects they'll use the next day.

✓ Half-day team workshop (up to 20 people)
✓ 1:1 executive intensive (90 min)
✓ Company-wide rollout (multi-session)
✓ Prompt library and Claude Projects delivered
See Training Formats →
Path 02 — Workflow Implementation

Claude built into your operations as a working system.

We design and build Claude-powered workflows for your highest-leverage repeating tasks — connected to your CRM, email tools, and existing platforms. Not experiments. Documented systems your team runs without us.

✓ Workflow audit and priority mapping
✓ Custom Claude integrations (API, Make, Zapier)
✓ Full documentation and team handoff
✓ Typical build: 4–8 weeks
Discuss Your Workflows →
What Gets Automated

The highest-leverage Claude use cases for B2B companies.

These are the tasks where Claude compresses hours into minutes — and where a well-configured implementation pays for itself within weeks.

✍️

Content at Scale

Blog posts, emails, sales collateral, social — produced 5–10x faster with consistent brand voice. Claude Projects keeps every output on-brand from draft one.

🎯

Sales Outreach Personalization

Research accounts and draft hyper-personalized sequences at scale. Claude reads company news, LinkedIn activity, and job posts to write outreach that doesn't sound like a template.

🔍

Competitive Research

Synthesize competitor positioning, pricing changes, and market signals into structured briefings. What takes a junior analyst a day takes Claude minutes.

💬

Customer Communication

First drafts for support, success, and account management that match your tone and policies. Your team edits and sends — they don't write from scratch.

📚

Internal Knowledge Q&A

Load your SOPs, playbooks, and documentation into Claude Projects. Your team asks questions in plain language and gets accurate, cited answers — no more digging through Notion.

📊

Meeting Intelligence

Pre-meeting research briefs, real-time note structuring, and post-meeting follow-up drafts — the full meeting loop automated so your team stays focused on the conversation.

The Process

From first call to working system.

Every engagement starts with understanding your team, your tools, and your highest-leverage workflows before a single prompt is written.

01
Scope 30-min call

We understand your team's current Claude usage, your highest-volume tasks, your tools, and what success looks like. This determines whether training, workflow build, or both is the right path.

02
Configure Week 1

We build and configure Claude Projects with your brand voice, ICP definition, style guides, and key reference documents. We write the foundational prompt library for your team's function before training begins.

03
Train & Build Week 1–8

Live training sessions with your team using their real work. For workflow builds, we design and implement Claude integrations with your existing tools — documented, tested, and handed off.

04
Hand Off Final week

Full documentation, a trained internal champion, and a follow-up session 30 days out. Your team owns the system. You're not dependent on us to keep it running.

"Bill runs four businesses using Claude as the operational backbone — this isn't theoretical training. It's implementation from someone who uses Claude daily to run marketing, research, content, and revenue workflows across multiple organizations."

— Bill Colbert, Treetop Growth Strategy · Austin, TX

Businesses Run on Claude
Claude for Business — FAQ

Every question we get about implementing Claude.

What does it mean to implement Claude in a business? +

Implementing Claude means going beyond buying seats. It means training your team to use Claude effectively, configuring Claude Projects with your brand voice and company context, building documented workflows for your highest-leverage tasks, and creating a prompt library your team actually uses. Most companies buy Claude and get 20% of its capability. Implementation closes that gap.

What is Claude AI and how can businesses use it? +

Claude is an AI assistant made by Anthropic, designed for complex reasoning, long documents, and nuanced writing. Businesses use it for content production at scale, sales outreach personalization, competitive research, customer communication drafting, internal knowledge Q&A, meeting prep and follow-up, and building AI-native workflows. It's especially strong for B2B companies with high-volume writing, analysis, and research tasks.

What is a Claude Project and why does it matter for teams? +

Claude Projects is a feature in Claude's paid plans that gives Claude persistent context — your brand voice, company background, ICP definition, style guides, and custom instructions — so every conversation starts with that context already loaded. For teams, this means every output is on-brand from the first draft. No more re-explaining your business in every session. Implementation includes setting up and configuring Projects for your specific function.

What's the difference between Claude Teams and Claude Enterprise? +

Claude Teams is Anthropic's paid plan for groups — shared Projects, team management, and higher usage limits. Claude Enterprise adds SSO, audit logs, expanded context windows (up to 500K tokens), and deeper data integrations. Most B2B companies at $5M–$50M start with Teams. We assess which plan fits based on your use cases and team size during the scoping call.

How long does it take to implement Claude for a business? +

Team training can be completed in a single half-day session — your team leaves with working prompts, configured Claude Projects, and documented workflows the same day. Full workflow implementation, where we build Claude into your core business processes and automations, typically takes 4–8 weeks depending on complexity. Most clients see measurable output improvement within the first week after training.

Do I need technical staff to implement Claude? +

For team training and Claude Projects configuration — no. This is non-technical work any team can complete. For building Claude-powered workflows connected to your existing tools (CRM, email platforms, databases), some technical involvement helps but is not required. We've built working Claude workflows for non-technical teams using Make, Zapier, and Airtable alongside the Claude API.

Can Claude access my company's internal data and documents? +

Yes, in several ways. Claude Projects lets you upload documents, SOPs, and reference materials that persist across conversations. Claude Enterprise supports deeper integrations. For real-time data access, Claude can be connected to internal systems via the Claude API integrated with tools like Make or custom builds. We assess your data environment and design the right approach during scoping.

What does a Claude workflow look like in practice? +

A Claude workflow automates a repeating business task using Claude as the intelligence layer. Example: a sales workflow that pulls account data from your CRM, runs it through Claude for research and personalization, and outputs a drafted sequence into your email tool — triggered automatically for every new qualified account. We document and build these as repeatable systems, not one-off experiments.

How is Claude different from ChatGPT for business use? +

Both are capable, but they differ meaningfully for business use. Claude has a significantly longer context window (up to 200K tokens on Teams, 500K on Enterprise), making it better for long documents, contracts, and extensive research. Claude tends to produce more nuanced, less generic writing — important for brand-specific content. Claude Projects provides persistent team context that ChatGPT's equivalent doesn't replicate as cleanly. Many organizations use both for different tasks.

How do I measure ROI on Claude implementation? +

The clearest metrics are time-per-task reduction (how long does it take to produce X before and after), output volume per person, and cost per deliverable. We establish baseline measurements before implementation and track against them. Most teams see 50–80% reduction in time on their highest-volume tasks within 30 days. Secondary metrics include quality consistency, team adoption rates, and reduction in external agency spend.

Who leads the implementation at Treetop? +

Bill Colbert leads all Claude implementation engagements. Bill runs four businesses using Claude as the operational backbone — this isn't theoretical training. It's implementation from someone who uses Claude daily for marketing, research, content, and revenue workflows across multiple business contexts. Every prompt library, Claude Project configuration, and workflow we build comes from systems that are actually running in production.

Ready to get Claude actually working in your business?

30 minutes with Bill. We'll figure out exactly where Claude creates the most leverage for your team and what implementation looks like.
